overall.description: First-person gameplay from a cyberpunk video game showing a player character waking up in an industrial apartment, walking through metal walkways and corridors, taking an elevator down through a red-lit lobby, and exiting into a neon-lit futuristic city street at night.

metal accordion security gate at corridor entrance

segments.scene_description: The character walks along an industrial walkway with large windows revealing a sprawling cyberpunk city at night. Steam vents release vapor near metal railings as the character moves through the apartment toward a security gate and stairwell.

pressing elevator button and entering the elevator car

segments.scene_description: The character approaches an elevator with a metal security gate, presses the call button, and enters the wood-paneled elevator car. The elevator descends and the doors open to reveal a dramatically different red-lit lobby.

segments.scene_description: Exiting the elevator, the scene shifts to a stylish lobby bathed in red neon light. The character walks down a red-carpeted corridor past a modern couch where an NPC stands, heading toward exit doors at the far end.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk city street with neon signage

events.description: exiting building through double doors onto city sidewalk

elevated pedestrian bridge connecting buildings across the street

segments.scene_description: The character exits through double doors into a neon-lit cyberpunk city street at night. Walking along the concrete sidewalk, futuristic buildings with glowing signage line the street while a black car drives past on the road.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from the intimacy of a private industrial apartment into the overwhelming scale of a neon-lit cyberpunk metropolis. It begins with the character waking up and crossing metal grate flooring toward a security door, moving through an industrial walkway where steam vents hiss beside windows overlooking a sprawling night city. The scene then shifts as the camera enters a wood-paneled elevator that descends, transitioning from the metallic apartment interior to a stylish lobby bathed in dramatic red neon light. After walking down a red-carpeted corridor past a modern couch and a waiting NPC, the camera pushes through double doors to finally emerge onto a concrete city street. The environment opens up completely to reveal towering futuristic buildings with glowing signage and a black car gliding past on the road.
